component.name: NexVPN
component.summary: Open-source VPN client with multi-protocol support

description.p: NexVPN is a modern, open-source VPN client supporting multiple protocols including VLESS, VMess, Trojan, Shadowsocks, Hysteria2, and TUIC. It features dual-core support (sing-box and xray-core), subscription management, smart routing rules, and a beautiful adaptive UI with 7 themes.

ul.li: Multi-protocol support: VLESS, VMess, Trojan, Shadowsocks, Hysteria2, TUIC
Dual core: sing-box and xray-core with runtime switching
Speed test, privacy shield, connection history

description.p: v2 UI redesign, Android Quick Settings Tile, mobile responsive layout, 7 themes.
